title: S.O. 1734 (E), dated 01/08/2012 - Appointment of Shri Justice Vikas Ramchandra Kingaonkar, former judge of High Court of Bombay, as the Judicial Member of the National Green Tribunal
description: S.O. 1734 (E), dated 01/08/2012 - Appointment of Shri Justice Vikas Ramchandra Kingaonkar, former judge of High Court of Bombay, as the Judicial Member of the National Green Tribunal

U 17(4 )/2011 -EtHel/Rd^^] ^sftcf fc, 7TREE EfEE MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESI S NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 1st August, 2012 S.0.1734(E) .—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (3) of Section 6 read with Section 7 of the National Green Tribunal Act, 2010 (19 of 2010), the Central Government hereby appoints Shri Justice Vikas Ramchandra Kingaonkar, former judge of High Court of Bombay, as the Judicial Member of the National Green Tribunal with effect from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette for a period of five years or till he attains the age of sixty-seven years, whichever, is earlier. [ENo. 17(4)/2011-PL/NGT] SURJIT'SINGH, Jt. Secy. 2861 GI/2012 Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri; New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
